query:
WITH
    position AS (
        SELECT
            p.latitude,
            p.longitude
        FROM
            user_hauls u
            INNER JOIN ais_positions p ON (
                p.mmsi = $1
                AND p.timestamp BETWEEN u.start_ts - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND u.start_ts  + INTERVAL '5 minutes'
            )
        WHERE
            u.user_haul_id = $2
        ORDER BY
            ABS(
                EXTRACT(
                    EPOCH
                    FROM
                        p.timestamp
                ) - EXTRACT(
                    EPOCH
                    FROM
                        u.start_ts
                )
            )
        LIMIT
            1
    )
UPDATE user_hauls h
SET
    start_longitude = p.longitude,
    start_latitude = p.latitude
FROM
    position p
WHERE
    h.user_haul_id = $2
